posts.title: Hello, World!
posts.text: Welcome to my website! My username is K4LM3D (/ka:md/) and this is my first post. Thanks for stopping by. I will be posting gaming related contents here. Hope you stay tuned for updates.

posts.title: CyberCode Online's K4LM3D
posts.text: About K4LM3D ℹ Standby at CyberCodeOnline (CCO)‘s Tagalog channel 🔭 Currently working on… 🎒 Crafting my Autonomous Storage Unit (ASU) backpack 🛒 Selling some of my old weapons and gears. Please check out my stall in the market called “Ukay-ukay” (in-game) ⛑ Helping krolik [BUN] on gathering gang resources until my mining skill go up to level 204 🌱 Currently learning… To craft my tech scraps, military ammunition tech parts, and medical tech parts into hash processors 🤝 Gang: Former member of X_MOD [X_X], Thoughts_of_Tacos [TOT], Kalasag [KLG] Former leader/founder of Ctrl_and_Shift [CAS], Peace_OutBreak [POB], Tagalog Channel [TAG] Friends with these gang’s leaders: Marauders_Empire [MSE], Asterion [AST], Nousagi [NSG] Hopper at these gangs: Conquerors [CQR], Marauders_Empire [MSE], Asterion [AST], Nousagi [NSG] 🐰 Currently a member of CyBunnies [BUN] We love to H.O.P. (help other people)! ⚡ Fun facts: ☕ I need cups of coffee not pain aways™ to heal 💭 I think a lot that’s why I wear a ro-bunny suit created with DELL-E‘s technology to relax 🤫 TMIs: 👤 My nickname, Kal, is given to me by my CCO best friends, Chief_Marauder [BUN] & Ain_sel [AST], and we have a group chat called ChAin3D on Discord 🚩 Nousagi [NSE] gang is basically Tagalog channel’s gang! 🎈 More friends: En_Roise [NSG], ZeaZ [EYN], GrimTalker [0_O], Khaelent [IDR], Nyxll [MSE], RSTwinBlade, SkaE_17 [NSG], SickPanel [0_O] 🤍 R.I.P.: King_of_kings [NSG] 💬 Ask me about… play CCO contribute to CCO 🤔 Looking for… Gang dungeon buddy Gang to hop on 📫 How to reach me: In-game: Mention me at CCO’s Tagalog channel and/or send me a private message Thru Discord and my other social media pages See you at CyberCode Online‘s Tagalog channel

posts.title: Ahoy!
posts.text: Name’s K4LM3D. I’m right here at our headquarters, recycling some items into scraps. Nothing special, just wanna share my journey and my friends’ at one of the busiest cities in the continent with y’all. That’s it for now guys. Needed to go for some gang duties.

posts.title: Online Ukay-Ukay
posts.text: SYSTEM🚨 Attention Citizens of Shangri-La!🛍 K4LM3D’s Online Ukay-ukay Stall is now open!✉ For inquiries, send a message to me in-game Lv. 126 Legendary Honor's Brutal Pistol Of Stunning+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 126+ EQUIPMENT: Primary Weapon+ MARK: Lethal+ STAT:- DAMAGE: 22427- STUN: 14+ UPGRADES SLOT: 3 Lv. 122 Legendary Engraved Reforged Sniper Rifle Of Crit Chance+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 122+ EQUIPMENT: Special Weapon+ MARK: Makeshift+ STAT:- DAMAGE: 27459- CRIT: 24+ UPGRADES SLOT: 2 Lv. 129 Legendary Whistling Savage Launcher Of Crit Chance+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 129+ EQUIPMENT: Destructive Weapon+ MARK: Makeshift+ STAT:- DAMAGE: 47013- CRIT: 24+ UPGRADES SLOT: 2 Lv. 125 Legendary Camouflage Underwear Of Evasion+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 125+ EQUIPMENT: Lower Armor+ MARK: Disruptor+ STAT:- HEALTH: 39691- ARMOR: 2206- EVADE: 13+ UPGRADES SLOT: 3 Lv. 125 Legendary Massive Ritual Disruptor of Crit Chance+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 125+ EQUIPMENT: Destructive Weapon+ MARK: Lethal+ STAT:- DAMAGE: 44844- CRIT: 15+ UPGRADES SLOT: 2 Lv. 125 Legendary Bike Helmet With Pockets+ TEIR: Legendary+ LEVEL: 125+ EQUIPMENT: Helmet+ MARK: Disruptor+ STAT:- HEALTH: 19846- ARMOR: 1103- POCKET: 5+ UPGRADES SLOT: 2 Lv. 124 Legendary Kimono With Pockets+ TEIR: Legendary+ LEVEL: 124+ EQUIPMENT: Upper Armor+ MARK: Lethal+ STAT:- HEALTH: 48822- ARMOR: 2713- POCKET: 5+ UPGRADES SLOT: 3 Lv. 123 Legendary Radiation Suit Top Of Crit Chance+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 123+ EQUIPMENT: Upper Armor+ MARK: Disruptor+ STAT:- HEALTH: 48038- ARMOR: 2669- CRIT: 4+ UPGRADES SLOT: 3 Lv. 125 Legendary Cleats With Pockets+ TIER: Legendary+ LEVEL: 125+ EQUIPMENT: Boots+ MARK: Makeshift+ STAT:- HEALTH: 9923- ARMOR: 552- POCKET: 5+ UPGRADES SLOT: 2
